violations.text: The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

The door to the outside, located in the front of the building, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the beer cooler have an accumulation of brown sludge and water. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
The drainage from 3 ceiling hoses is draining into the only hand sink in the kitchen. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
